rationale: Both reviews correctly identify that IsUnipotent and ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup are premature (scope violation), but Review 1 additionally catches a concrete bundling issue in AffineAlgGroup — coupling finiteType with geomReduced in one class — which Review 2 overlooks. Splitting these as Review 1 advises would yield a better-scoped foundation, while Review 2 would leave the bundled class intact.
